languages.original_text: "I have chosen to systematise the experience I gained and make use of it. Tervantias, for all his worthlessness, demonstrated several interesting techniques of vivisection, organ separation, and tissue splicing in his experiments on me. I believe I can replicate and even improve upon them. Little by little, this rational processing of my experiences of torture will allow me to recover from the shock inflicted upon my mind."

languages.text: "Я предпочел систематизировать полученный опыт и извлечь из него пользу. Тервантьяс, при всей свой никчемности, продемонстрировал на мне несколько интересных техник вивисекции, сепарации органов и сращивания тканей. Я думаю, что смогу их повторить и даже улучшить. Мало-помалу подобная рациональная переработка пережитых пыток позволяет мне восстанавливаться от потрясения, которое перенес мой разум".

"I have chosen to systematise the experience I gained and make use of it. I believe I can replicate and even improve upon them. Little by little, this rational processing of my experiences of torture will allow me to recover from the shock inflicted upon my mind."

languages.text: «He optado por sistematizar la experiencia que he obtenido y aprovecharla. Tervantias, por inútil que fuera, demostró técnicas interesantes de vivisección, separación de órganos y seccionamiento de tejidos en los experimentos que realizó conmigo. Creo que puedo replicarlos e incluso mejorarlos. Poco a poco, este procesamiento racional de mi encierro y tortura me permitirá recuperarme de la impresión que le causó a mi mente».
languages.original_text: "I have chosen to systematise the experience I gained and make use of it. Tervantias, for all his worthlessness, demonstrated several interesting techniques of vivisection, organ separation, and tissue splicing in his experiments on me. I believe I can replicate and even improve upon them. Little by little, this rational processing of my experiences of torture will allow me to recover from the shock inflicted upon my mind."

Tervantias, por inútil que fuera, demostró técnicas interesantes de vivisección, separación de órganos y seccionamiento de tejidos en los experimentos que realizó conmigo. Creo que puedo replicarlos e incluso mejorarlos. Poco a poco, este procesamiento racional de mi encierro y tortura me permitirá recuperarme de la impresión que le causó a mi mente».

languages.text: “我决定把这段经历进行系统化整理，并加以利用。特万提亚斯虽然一无是处，但他在我身上做实验时，确实展示了几项有趣的技术。比如活体解剖、器官分离和组织拼接。我相信我能够复现这些技术，甚至还能加以改进。通过一步步理性处理这些受折磨的经历，我的精神创伤也能慢慢恢复。”
languages.original_text: "I have chosen to systematise the experience I gained and make use of it. Tervantias, for all his worthlessness, demonstrated several interesting techniques of vivisection, organ separation, and tissue splicing in his experiments on me. I believe I can replicate and even improve upon them. Little by little, this rational processing of my experiences of torture will allow me to recover from the shock inflicted upon my mind."

traits.locale_text: “我决定把这段经历进行系统化整理，并加以利用。特万提亚斯虽然一无是处，但他在我身上做实验时，确实展示了几项有趣的技术。比如活体解剖、器官分离和组织拼接。我相信我能够复现这些技术，甚至还能加以改进。通过一步步理性处理这些受折磨的经历，我的精神创伤也能慢慢恢复。”

languages.text: « J'ai fait le choix de normaliser cette expérience et de m'en servir. Malgré son manque de valeur, Tervantias m'a fait voir plusieurs techniques de vivisection, de séparation d'organes et de manipulation des tissus qui m'ont paru intéressantes lors des expériences qu'il m'a fait subir. Je pense être en mesure de les répliquer, voire de les améliorer. Petit à petit, cette analyse rationnelle de mon expérience avec la torture me permettra de me remettre du choc infligé à mon esprit. »
languages.original_text: "I have chosen to systematise the experience I gained and make use of it. Tervantias, for all his worthlessness, demonstrated several interesting techniques of vivisection, organ separation, and tissue splicing in his experiments on me. I believe I can replicate and even improve upon them. Little by little, this rational processing of my experiences of torture will allow me to recover from the shock inflicted upon my mind."

traits.locale_text: « J'ai fait le choix de normaliser cette expérience et de m'en servir. Malgré son manque de valeur, Tervantias m'a fait voir plusieurs techniques de vivisection, de séparation d'organes et de manipulation des tissus qui m'ont paru intéressantes lors des expériences qu'il m'a fait subir. Je pense être en mesure de les répliquer, voire de les améliorer. Petit à petit, cette analyse rationnelle de mon expérience avec la torture me permettra de me remettre du choc infligé à mon esprit. »

languages.text: "Ich habe beschlossen, meine gesammelten Erfahrung zu systematisieren und zu nutzen. Tervantias hat bei seinen Experimenten mit mir trotz seiner Wertlosigkeit einige interessante Techniken der Vivisektion, der Organentnahme und des Gewebe-Splicings demonstriert. Ich glaube, ich kann sie replizieren und sogar verbessern. Nach und nach wird mir diese rationale Verarbeitung meiner Foltererfahrung ermöglichen, mich von dem Schock zu erholen, den mein Verstand erlitten hat."
languages.original_text: "I have chosen to systematise the experience I gained and make use of it. Tervantias, for all his worthlessness, demonstrated several interesting techniques of vivisection, organ separation, and tissue splicing in his experiments on me. I believe I can replicate and even improve upon them. Little by little, this rational processing of my experiences of torture will allow me to recover from the shock inflicted upon my mind."

traits.locale_text: "Ich habe beschlossen, meine gesammelten Erfahrung zu systematisieren und zu nutzen. Tervantias hat bei seinen Experimenten mit mir trotz seiner Wertlosigkeit einige interessante Techniken der Vivisektion, der Organentnahme und des Gewebe-Splicings demonstriert. Ich glaube, ich kann sie replizieren und sogar verbessern. Nach und nach wird mir diese rationale Verarbeitung meiner Foltererfahrung ermöglichen, mich von dem Schock zu erholen, den mein Verstand erlitten hat."

languages.text: 「私は得た経験を体系化し、活用することにした。ターバンティアスは、その無価値さにもかかわらず、私に対する実験で、いくつかの興味深い生体解剖、臓器分離、組織スプライシングのテクニックを披露してくれた。私はそれを再現し、さらに改良することができると信じている。少しずつ、この拷問体験を理性的に処理することで、私の心に与えられたショックから立ち直ることができるだろう」。
languages.original_text: "I have chosen to systematise the experience I gained and make use of it. Tervantias, for all his worthlessness, demonstrated several interesting techniques of vivisection, organ separation, and tissue splicing in his experiments on me. I believe I can replicate and even improve upon them. Little by little, this rational processing of my experiences of torture will allow me to recover from the shock inflicted upon my mind."

languages.text: "Kazandığım deneyimi sistemleştirmeyi ve kullanmayı seçtim. Tervantias, tüm o değersizliğine rağmen üzerimde yaptığı deneylerde birkaç ilginç dirikesim, organ ayırma ve doku birleştirme tekniği gösterdi. Bunları kopyalayabileceğime ve hatta geliştirebileceğime inanıyorum. İşkence deneyimlerimin rasyonel işlemesi, zihnimde yaratılan şoktan yavaşça kurtulmamı sağlayacak."
languages.original_text: "I have chosen to systematise the experience I gained and make use of it. Tervantias, for all his worthlessness, demonstrated several interesting techniques of vivisection, organ separation, and tissue splicing in his experiments on me.
